Ford will own 66% of the venture, Geely 34%. Pending regulatory approvals, operations begin in the first half of 2027, with the first new vehicles rolling off the line in 2028. For most people who have it, the centre of the world slowly greys out. Faces blur. Words vanish. There is no cure, only treatments that slow the loss. Now a small chip is giving some of that sight back. Science Corp, based in Alameda, California, […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> China’s Psibot hits a $1.48bn valuation betting on ‘world models’ https://thenextweb.com/news/psibot-china-world-models-1-48-billion-valuation Thu, 23 Jul 2026 13:50:07 +0000 TheNextWeb=d7a9707af8a88c97809c8fb1b0b41f4a Viktor Wang has a favourite piece of history. In 2019, OpenAI’s GPT-2 showed that a machine trained on nothing but internet text could write like a person. It was crude, but it was a hinge. Wang thinks robots are about to have the same moment. He is raising money to be there when they do.
